listening.title: Listening: A debate
listening.transcript: Some people support online learning because it saves time. Nevertheless, many students argue that they learn better in person. As a result, schools usually offer both options nowadays.

questions.question: What do schools usually offer nowadays?

listening.title: Listening: Technology and jobs
listening.transcript: Technology has changed education a lot. Many jobs will require digital skills in the future. A great deal of training is needed for this kind of job.

questions.question: What will many future jobs require?
questions.explanation: "Many jobs will require digital skills in the future."
